description_long: This is a brown ceramic or stoneware bottle with a rounded body and a single side handle, reminiscent of a traditional growler. The bottle features a wide neck with a metal flip-top closure secured by a wire bail and a ceramic or plastic stopper. The main body is wrapped in a deep red label with white text and graphics, including a stylized logo of a golem face, product information, and various symbols. The label covers most of the bottle's circumference, with nutritional facts and a barcode visible on the back. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, giving it a rustic, handcrafted look.
description: A brown ceramic growler-style bottle with a side handle, flip-top closure, and a deep red label featuring a golem logo and product details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the golem logo, product name, and volume details prominently on the red label.
description_view_1: Rear view displays a block of white text and part of a graphic, with the handle and closure mechanism visible.
description_view_2: Side view highlights the handle, several white graphic symbols, and a barcode on the label.
description_view_3: Opposite side shows nutritional facts, a stylized face logo, and the flip-top closure from the back.
attribute_label_or_branding: The bottle features a deep red label with a white stylized golem face logo, the word 'Golem', 'strong brown beer', volume (0.8L), alcohol percentage (13%), nutritional facts, a barcode, and various white graphic symbols. The branding is bold and centrally placed on the front.
